$comment: decompose-result.schema.json — the typed stdout envelope of decompose.mjs (sprint §0.1). A discriminated union on `type`; the house validate-schema.mjs is a draft-07 SUBSET (no oneOf), so the arms are modelled as optional properties keyed by type. The internal 'fail' outcome of dagValidate is NOT a stdout result — it maps to exit 3 — so it is excluded here.
